routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 35g
| — 6 whites & 3 yolks of beldi eggs fried with 5g of olive oil
| — 5g of raw olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 35g + warm water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder with water
| — 1 apple
| — 2 garlic cloves
-----------------------

14:00 — return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — chicken breast 200g raw cooked with 1 tsp of motard and 5g of olive oil
| — brown rice 25g raw
| — 300g legume sauté with 5g of olive oil (40% carrot, 40% courgette, 20% onion)
| — cumin & salt
-----------------------

18:00 — Black Coffee
18:00
      — (4h) Rest or Billard & Water 1L
21:00
21:00 — Back Home

-----------------------
| 21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 10g Almonds & Walnuts & Cashews & Pistachios
| — 10g pumpkin seeds
| — 1 kiwi
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep
